Our Story

Why
Rooted?

In Traditional Chinese Medicine, everything begins at the root — gēn (根). When we nourish what's foundational — our energy, our digestion, our body — harmony follows naturally. That's hé (和).

For some of us, these ideas are woven into childhood memories: a pot of herbal soup on the stove, a grandmother's quiet insistence that food is medicine. For others, it's a new discovery — an ancient wisdom that makes us slow down and reconnect with our bodies in a world that moves too fast.

Rooted is for both. We don't ask you to believe anything. We simply offer what generations before us already knew: that the best health is nourished slowly, from the root up.

Every product is crafted from traditional formulations passed down through generations — adapted for modern life. Real ingredients, real tradition, real care.

What We Believe
和
Harmony
Health isn't about adding more — it's about finding balance. Every Rooted product is formulated to support your body's natural equilibrium.
根
Root
We go to the root. Not quick fixes, not trends — but foundational nourishment that builds health from within, the way TCM has done for millennia.
真
Authenticity
No gimmicks, no shortcuts. Real herbs, real formulations, real heritage. We honor the tradition that made this wisdom possible.

Herbal Tea
祛湿茶
Back to all products
Dampness Adieu
祛湿茶
$40.00
10-pack
About This Blend

If you've been feeling bloated, heavy, or more tired than usual — if your digestion has slowed down or your body just feels a little off — you're not alone. In Traditional Chinese Medicine, these are recognized as signs of dampness accumulating in the body, and they're more common than you might think.

Our Dampness Adieu blend draws on time-tested Chinese herbs and natural ingredients to help your body release what it's holding onto — clearing toxins and excess dampness so you can return to your natural rhythm.

Pair it with warm, nourishing foods and a walk in the sun to bid that dampness adieu.

Key Ingredients
炒米
Roasted Rice
Warms the spleen and supports digestion
红枣
Jujube Dates
Nourishes qi and blood, tonifies the spleen
桂圆
Dried Longan
Calms the mind and replenishes vital energy
枸杞
Goji Berries
Supports the liver and kidneys, nourishes essence
黄芪
Astragalus Root
Strengthens wei qi (protective energy) and boosts vitality
山药
Chinese Yam
Tonifies the spleen and stomach, supports moisture balance
芡实
Gorgon Fruit
Strengthens the spleen and locks in vital energy while dispelling dampness
赤小豆
Phaseolous Chinese Herb
Clears dampness and heat, reduces swelling and supports fluid balance
How to Brew
1
Add one packet to a kettle or pot with 5 cups of water.
2
Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes.
3
Filter out the ingredients before drinking.
4
Pour into your thermos and sip throughout the day. Best enjoyed hot or warm.

Beauty Brew
美颜茶
$40.00
10-pack
About This Blend

Our ancestors understood something timeless: that true beauty is nourished from within. Beauty Brew brings that ancient wisdom into your modern, busy life — a subtly sweet, collagen-boosting blend designed to support your skin, body, and spirit from the inside out.

Enjoy it as an afternoon pick-me-up or a comforting nighttime treat. This isn't skincare in a bottle — it's nourishment in a bowl.

Key Ingredients
银耳
Snow Fungus
Nature's collagen; deeply hydrates and supports skin elasticity
枸杞
Goji Berries
Rich in antioxidants, nourishes the liver and brightens complexion
红枣
Jujube Dates
Tonifies qi and blood, promotes a healthy glow
莲子
Lotus Seeds
Calms the mind and strengthens the spleen
冰糖
Rock Sugar
Gently sweetens and moistens, balancing the blend's warmth
How to Enjoy
1
Add one packet to a pot with 4 cups of water.
2
Bring to a boil, then simmer for 30 minutes.
3
Ladle the soup with all the ingredients into a bowl and enjoy.

Morning Mantra Oatmeal
晨韵粥
$35.00
10-pack
About This Blend

Start your morning grounded. Our Morning Mantra Oatmeal is made with nourishing, wholesome ingredients chosen to support your digestion, spark steady energy, and keep you full throughout the day. No crash, no bloat — just a warm, grounding start to whatever comes next.

Key Ingredients
燕麦
Oatmeal
Whole grain fiber for sustained energy and steady digestion
黑芝麻粉
Black Sesame Powder
Nourishes the kidneys and liver, supports healthy hair and skin
枸杞
Goji Berries
Replenishes vital essence and adds a touch of natural sweetness
How to Make
1
At home: Pour one packet and 2 cups of water or your choice of milk into a small pot and bring to a boil. Stir constantly and cook until the oats have softened and absorbed the liquid.
2
On the go: Mix one packet with 2 cups of water or milk and microwave for 2 minutes.
✦
Pro tip: Add an egg for extra protein.
